memory:memory/2026-04-18.md:5:10.snippet: - Defined Palletelle sourcing and ingestion model for Amazon affiliate listings in docs/sourcing-model.md with hybrid discovery, raw->normalized->inferred->staged pipeline, provenance tracking, human-reviewed storefront approval, and explicit truth/inference separation. - Hardened sourcing enforcement defaults: price freshness threshold 24h, availability freshness threshold 12h, stale price and stale availability hidden from storefront, explicit source attribution and last-updated support, no automatic publication. - Aligned sourcing enforcement into agent/admin docs: atelier-catalog must enforce freshness, stale suppression, refusal on rule violations, no direct storefront publication; admi

memory:memory/2026-04-18.md:16:19.snippet: - Began implementation-ready sourcing code structures in packages/domain and apps/admin: created sourcing domain types (including ProductSource, ProductProvenance, FreshnessState with status/checkedAt/thresholdHours/reason, StagingStatus enum, ReviewDecision enum), pure guard functions, validation helpers, and fixture-backed admin app scaffold for staging queue and review detail with placeholder review actions. - Implemented stronger source-vs-normalized-vs-inferred separation in the domain model and admin review UI, so raw source facts, normalized facts, and inferred fields are structurally distinct and visually obvious at review time. - Hit a workspace/package alignment issue in apps/admin
